title: Nightbat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|night|more=bat}}
'''Nightbats''' were flying creatures native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. They were nocturnal and attracted to light. Their bodies were insect-like and they were equipped with leathery wings and six segmented legs, each with a sharp claw.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
